title: Trump wanting Panama, Canada & Greenland. Trump must depixilate Atlantis to be a shaker. Requested.

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about Trump's stated ambitions to acquire the Panama Canal, make Canada the 51st state, and buy Greenland from Denmark. He argues these are empty stunts from an uneducated politician trying to compensate for his bankruptcy history, then pivots to personal updates about health issues, cleaning his house, pets, and noticing signs of aging.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: a stunt; suggests nuclear widening as absurdist alternative
uneducated rich kid compensating for six bankruptcies with hollow big-win gestures

stances.topic: Trump claiming judge appointments as accomplishment
stances.position: meaningless — you appoint judges as needed, volume means nothing

stances.topic: Trump's interest in Greenland while denying climate change

stances.position: could make sense as a voluntary union in maybe 100 years, but not via Trump's approach
Trump would prove himself a real mover and shaker only if he depixelated Atlantis on Google Maps

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump wants to invade and take back the Panama Canal for America.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump wants to make Canada the 51st state of America.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump wants to buy Greenland from Denmark.

claims.subject: America
claims.claim: Adding Canada would more than double the size of America, making it look as big as Russia.

claims.subject: Panama Canal
claims.claim: Sequential nuclear bombing of the Panama Canal could make it big enough to fit the biggest boats, including aircraft carriers.

claims.subject: Panama Canal
claims.claim: A steady flow current river could be created in the Panama Canal with violent water, using a tyrus along the edge to bounce boats through at 50 miles per hour.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump doesn't have any ideas and is not educated as a politician or legislator.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump inherited his dad's $400 million and got lucky with getting out of debt after bankruptcies.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump has an extreme desire to have big wins to offset his six bankruptcies.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump has a bizarre sense of accomplishment, such as bragging about appointing a certain number of judges.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump will do anything, even hurt the country, to get the stock market up at the right time.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump knows enough about history to have heard about the Louisiana Purchase from Napoleon but isn't smart enough to understand why Napoleon sold it.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump keeps saying global warming is fake but is interested in Greenland, which contradicts his stance.

claims.subject: Canada
claims.claim: It's an interesting concept to think about America and Canada forming a union or coalescing into North America in the future, maybe in a hundred years.

claims.subject: Atlantis
claims.claim: Someone has to be responsible for the depixelization of Atlantis.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle filmed a video in the beginning of August showing proof of the pixelation of Atlantis.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to show the proof of Atlantis in tomorrow's vlog and every vlog after.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had a health crisis last night, feeling sick and up all night in pain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks he might be getting avian flu because he has four birds that poop all over his place.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's ferrets poop and smell all over his room, making it stinky.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle was too lazy to clean his house because he was busy with his site.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle cleaned his house for the first time in years using a cleaning solution of vinegar, alcohol, and water.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle bought $10 worth of weed to help him clean all night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle drank an energy drink last night and has been doing so for the last few days, causing stomach pain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is starting to feel his age, getting loopy, having trouble motivating, and physically achy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks his body and brain are declining due to aging and not taking care of himself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle forgot he already did a video log for the day and did it a second time.
